note_sections.text: Patient is a 54-year-old female with hypertension presenting for routine wellness visit. She reports fatigue and mild shortness of breath on exertion over the past 6 weeks. She is obese with a BMI of 36.2 documented today. She snores heavily and her husband reports she stops breathing at night. She denies chest pain or leg swelling.

1. Hypertension, essential
2. Fatigue
3. Obesity — BMI 36.2 documented
BP: 142/88 mmHg, HR: 82 bpm, Weight: 103kg, BMI: 36.2, Temperature: 98.7F, SpO2: 96%
